query:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.sector,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.company LIKE '%atlascopco%' OR c.email LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%' THEN 1 END) AS internal_sr_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND (c.company NOT LIKE '%atlascopco%' AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email NOT LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%')) THEN 1 END) AS real_sr_count
FROM projects p
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND (c.company LIKE '%atlascopco%' OR c.company LIKE '%atlas copco%' OR c.email LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%')
GROUP BY p.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.sector,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.company LIKE '%atlascopco%' OR c.email LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%' THEN 1 END) AS internal_sr_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND (c.company NOT LIKE '%atlascopco%' AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email NOT LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%')) THEN 1 END) AS real_sr_count
FROM projects p
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND (c.company LIKE '%atlascopco%' OR c.company LIKE '%atlas copco%' OR c.email LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%')
GROUP BY p.id;
